creator: llevier@argosnet.com
text:
Hi Edwin,

Sorry for late reply, was out of office.

Seems that's a good port (I did not tested compile), ok to me.

Thanks!

Brgrds

At 22:20 29/11/2010, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
>Maintainer of security/hydra,
>
>Please note that PR ports/152683 has just been submitted.
>
>If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>and a committer will take care of it.
>
>The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/152683
>
>--
>Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
>--
>Ce message a =E9t=E9 v=E9rifi=E9 par MailScanner
>pour des virus ou des polluriels et rien de
>suspect n'a =E9t=E9 trouv=E9.
